raw_title: SEC Investor Advisory Committee to Host March 12 Meeting
raw_content: The Securities and Exchange Commission’s Investor Advisory Committee will hold a public meeting at the SEC Headquarters in Washington D.C. on March 12 at 10 a.m. ET to discuss public company disclosure reform, fund proxy voting, and a potential…
generated_title: SEC投资者咨询委员会3月12日召开公开会议
generated_summary: SEC投资者咨询委员会将于3月12日在华盛顿总部举办公开会议，讨论公众公司披露改革、基金代理投票及潜在议题。
